data.content: Implementation review REJECTED: 99 ESLint warnings remain on main across all 22 target files (57 max-len, 12 max-lines, 16 max-lines-per-function). Branch feat/foolery-d17b-style exists but was never merged to main. That branch also used config-level suppression (turning rules off) rather than actual refactoring (splitting files, extracting functions) as described in the beat. Worst offenders: terminal-manager.ts (13 warnings), bd.ts (11), local-worker.ts (9), agent-adapter.ts (8), settings.ts (8).
